content:
Hi all,

The Rust Microconference for the Linux Plumbers Conference 2023 has been accepted!

  • https://lpc.events/event/17/sessions/170/

Proposals can be submitted now at:

  • https://lpc.events/event/17/abstracts/

For those of you that want to attend in person, please note that the registration is opening soon:

  • https://lpc.events/blog/current/index.php/2023/06/14/registration-for-lpc-2023-is-almost-here/

Cheers,
Miguel
We have an "LPC" stream below, to have discussions about it: https://rust-for-linux.zulipchat.com/#narrow/stream/330227-LPC-.28Linux-Plumbers-Conference.29
